cards.name: yú/ㄩˊ

cards.name: yǎn/ㄧㄢˇ

cards.name: yǔ/ㄩˇ
definitions: (formal) and; together with (linking parallel nouns, verbs, or phrases)

(formal) with; from (marking the other participant in an interaction, comparison, or contrast, e.g. _他握手|_他握手[yǔ tā wò shǒu] "shake hands with him", _去年不同|_去年不同[yǔ qù nián bù tóng] "different from last year")

cards.name: zēng/ㄗㄥ
